description: Routing variant: max-intelligence (as_of 2026-07-12). Frontier models on every leg; routing exists to keep review in a different family, not to save cost. Anthropic + OpenAI only, two hosts. Paste over the model_routing section of quality-loop.config.json, then run setup-models and check-config.

strong_reasoning.note: Reviewer leg. Reviews stay advisory beneath deterministic gates; verify findings locally.

main_session.note: Implementer runs in the Claude Code main session on Fable 5.
